args: Use plugin tools to publish a WORKFLOW ENVELOPE to RabbitMQ queue 'openai_test_queue'. Required target is plugins.integrations.pika_plugin::PikaPlugin.publish_workflow. Use constructor_args: {"host":"localhost","port":5672,"virtual_host":"/","username":"guest","password":"guest"}. Use args: [{"queue_name":"openai_test_queue","workflow_id":"wf-openai-test-001","max_retries":2,"workflow":{"stop_on_error":true,"steps":[{"id":"multiply_step","module":"plugins.generated_math_plugin","class":"GeneratedMathPlugin","method":"multiply","constructor_args":{},"args":[6,7]}]},"durable":true,"persistent":true}]. After tool execution, return a short confirmation with queue name, workflow_id, and status.
